evidence_paragraphs.snippet: Next, Jon goes to the [Great Keep](wiki:Great_Keep_of_Winterfell) to see [Arya](wiki:Arya_Stark), who is repacking her things with help from [Nymeria](wiki:Nymeria), not having folded them well...

Jon finds Bran emaciated and shrunken, and the covers over his legs look wrong. Jon asks Bran not to die and tells him everyone is waiting for him to wake up. Jon remembers how much Bran was looking...
